# @faucet/abuse-geoip

Country / ASN / VPN / datacenter abuse check with pluggable resolvers.

```ts
import { geoipCheck, MaxMindResolver } from '@faucet/abuse-geoip';

const resolver = new MaxMindResolver({
  countryDbPath: '/data/geoip/GeoLite2-Country.mmdb',
  asnDbPath: '/data/geoip/GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb',
});

const check = geoipCheck({
  resolver,
  policy: {
    denyCountries: ['KP', 'IR'],
    allowCountries: undefined,    // or a whitelist
    denyVpn: true,
    denyTor: true,
    denyHosting: true,
    denyAsns: [],
  },
});
```

Resolvers shipped:
- `MaxMindResolver` — reads GeoLite2 `.mmdb` files on disk (offline). Needs a MaxMind license key to download the DBs.
- `IpinfoResolver` — calls `ipinfo.io` with an API token; in-memory LRU cache.

Resolver interface is public, so integrators can plug their own (`Cloudflare Radar`, `ipapi`, in-house ASN feed, etc.):

```ts
interface GeoIpResolver { readonly id: string; lookup(ip: string): Promise<GeoIpResult>; }
```

Heuristic hosting / VPN detection (`isHostingOrg`, `isVpnOrg`) is a substring match on the ASN org name. Not exhaustive; meant as a reasonable default when you don't have a paid anonymous-IP feed.
